← 江和洲 · 代表性项目Hezhou Jiang · Selected work
代表性项目 01 · 住房公平与绿灰基础设施Selected work 01 · Housing equity & infrastructure

环境宜居性如何影响住房公平：城市绿色与灰色基础设施在住区更新中的成本—收益动态 Quantifying Amenity Impact on Housing Equity: Cost-Benefit Dynamics of Urban Green & Grey Infrastructure in Residential Regeneration

以杭州为例，用十年、十二万条住房交易与基础设施空间数据，测度存量住区"低成本、可负担"更新的空间机会与潜在风险。 A decade of Hangzhou housing transactions and infrastructure geodata used to map where low-cost, affordable neighbourhood regeneration is feasible — and where it is not.

期刊Journal · Habitat International, 2026 身份Role · 第一作者First author 研究区Study area · 中国 · 杭州Hangzhou, China 方法Methods · 空间计量 + 因果推断Spatial econometrics + causal inference
118,181 条交易transactions 1,560 个社区neighbourhoods 2012–2023 SDM 2SLS / IV MGWR PSM

研究速览Key takeaways

  • 绿色基础设施（GSC）抬高房价、却抑制换手——业主更倾向持有，可能推高政府征收更新的成本。Green infrastructure (GSC) lifts prices but dampens turnover — owners hold on, which can push up the acquisition cost of regeneration.
  • 灰色基础设施（GRSC）对应更低房价、更高换手——为"低成本、高流动"的可负担更新创造机会。Grey infrastructure (GRSC) aligns with lower prices and higher turnover — opening room for low-cost, high-liquidity affordable regeneration.
  • 基础设施主要通过空间外溢而非直接效应影响市场：邻里环境比小区自身属性更关键。Infrastructure shapes the market mainly through spatial spillovers, not direct effects — the surroundings matter more than a neighbourhood's own attributes.
  • 行政、医疗设施周边呈现"低成本、高收益"的理想更新潜力。Areas around administrative and medical facilities show the most ideal low-cost, high-benefit potential.
  • 面板分析揭示投资者普遍短期化、缺乏长期规划，是可持续更新计划的潜在威胁。Panel analysis reveals a pervasive short-term investment tendency — a latent threat to sustainable regeneration plans.
§

摘要Abstract

在中国城镇化模式深刻转型与人口老龄化的背景下，存量住区"经济、可负担"的更新，已成为推动社会可持续与包容性的必要领域。区位、绿色与灰色基础设施、公共服务、房价与交易量等诸多因素，共同影响更新项目的成本—收益动态与结果。本文利用杭州 2012–2023 年 1,560 个社区的基础设施空间分布与 118,181 条住房交易记录，通过严谨的空间计量与因果推断流程，系统评估城市住区更新的成本—收益特征及潜在威胁。

研究发现：绿地带来的高持有意愿可能推高更新成本；相反，灰色基础设施对应更高的需求与换手，行政或医疗设施周边尤其呈现"低成本、高收益"的理想潜力，使可持续、可负担的更新成为可能。然而，面板分析揭示，投资者普遍存在短期投资倾向、缺乏长期住房规划，这可能威胁政府的可持续更新计划。本研究为发展中国家城市可负担住区更新的落地提供了新的视角。

Against China's shifting urbanization model and an aging population, the economic, affordable regeneration of existing neighbourhoods has become essential to social sustainability and inclusion. Location, green and grey infrastructure, public services, housing prices and transaction volumes jointly shape the cost–benefit dynamics of regeneration.

Using the spatial distribution of infrastructure across 1,560 Hangzhou neighbourhoods and 118,181 housing-transaction records (2012–2023), this study applies rigorous spatial-econometric and causal-inference procedures to assess the cost–benefit characteristics and latent threats of regeneration. A high willingness to hold property around green space can raise renewal costs; grey infrastructure, by contrast, fosters demand and turnover, with areas around administrative or medical facilities showing ideal low-cost, high-benefit potential. Panel analysis, however, reveals a pervasive short-term investment tendency that could threaten sustainable regeneration plans — offering new insights for affordable neighbourhood regeneration in developing-country cities.

关键词Keywords 绿色基础设施 · 灰色基础设施 · 住房需求 · 因果推断 · 社会公平Green infrastructure · Grey infrastructure · Housing demand · Causal inference · Social equity

01

研究背景Background

中国城镇化率已接近发达国家，但以经济增长和土地出让为主导的模式，并未可持续地解决居民的住房问题。持续高企的房价叠加基础设施服务分配不均，加剧了绅士化。2023 年，国务院出台保障性住房规划建设政策，将其作为缓解住房市场压力、保障住房资源公平配置的关键举措。

在政策落地中，政府面临两难：一是征收存量老旧、空置住房改建为可负担住房，难点在于平衡征收的成本与收益；二是在新增土地上建设，可在一定程度上控制开发成本，但选址往往远离既有便利设施，抬升居民生活与通勤成本。因此，在开发成本与设施宜居性之间取得平衡，实现住房可负担性、设施可达性与财政可持续性的协调发展，成为住区更新决策的关键任务。

China's urbanization rate now approaches that of developed countries, yet a growth- and land-auction-driven model has not sustainably solved housing. Persistently high prices plus uneven infrastructure have deepened gentrification. In 2023 the State Council issued affordable-housing policy as a key lever for fairer allocation of housing resources.

Implementing it, government faces a dilemma: requisition and rebuild old or vacant stock (hard to balance cost against benefit), or build on new land (cheaper land, but sites often sit far from existing amenities, raising living and commuting costs). Balancing development cost against infrastructure amenity — reconciling affordability, accessibility and fiscal sustainability — is therefore the central task in regeneration decisions.

02

研究区与数据Study area & data

研究聚焦浙江省杭州市中心城区，含 8 个行政区、1,560 个社区。杭州是中国增长最快的城市之一：2023 年常住人口 1,252.2 万，城镇化率 84.2%；住房单价由 2012 年的 18,713 元/㎡ 升至 2023 年的 33,231 元/㎡，年交易量由 4 万套增至 18 万套。其对土地与住房市场的高度财政依赖，是许多中国快速发展城市的典型特征。

The study centres on Hangzhou's core urban districts — 8 districts, 1,560 neighbourhoods. By 2023 its permanent population reached 12.52 million (84.2% urbanized); unit prices rose from 18,713 CNY/m² (2012) to 33,231 CNY/m² (2023), and annual transactions from 40,000 to 180,000. Its heavy fiscal reliance on land and housing is typical of fast-growing Chinese cities.

所有数据经裁剪、矢量化并按 1,560 个社区分别求均，划分为 6 个时段（2012–13 … 2022–23），形成含 9,360 个样本的面板数据。变量涵盖被解释变量（房价、总价、交易量、交易密度）、核心解释变量、调节变量（公共服务）、工具变量，以及房屋、小区、区位与环境特征。

All data were clipped, vectorized and averaged into the 1,560 neighbourhoods, then split into six periods (2012–13 … 2022–23), yielding a 9,360-sample panel. Variables span the explained variables, core explanatory variables, moderators (public services), an instrument, and apartment, estate, neighbourhood and environment features.

核心变量：UGGSC = GSC × GRSCCore variables: UGGSC = GSC × GRSC

核心解释变量 UGGSC 由本地绿色（GSC）与灰色（GRSC）基础设施的交互构成。GSC 以绿地占比与路网密度的交互项刻画（兼顾比例与可达性），绿地含规划公园绿地、防护绿地、广场绿地及来自 GlobeLand30 的森林、草地、水体、湿地、灌木；GRSC 以不透水面占比与路网密度的交互项计算。

UGGSC is the interaction of local green (GSC) and grey (GRSC) infrastructure. GSC combines the share of green infrastructure with road-line density (capturing both proportion and accessibility); green types include planned park, buffer and square green space plus forest, grassland, water, wetland and shrub from GlobeLand30. GRSC uses the share of impervious surface × road-line density.

被解释变量包括住房单价、总价、交易量与交易密度，来自房天下十年交易数据库（共 118,181 条），坐标经高德地图 API 地理编码。调节变量为医疗、商业、文化、交通、行政、旅游六类城市公共服务设施（POI）。工具变量取年均气温与 PM2.5 浓度的交互——二者与 UGGSC 内在相关，却外生于房市波动。

Explained variables — unit price, total price, transaction volume and density — come from a decade-long Fang.com database (118,181 records), geocoded via the Gaode Map API. Moderators are six POI service types (medical, commercial, cultural, traffic, administrative, tourism). The instrument is the interaction of annual temperature and PM2.5 — intrinsically linked to UGGSC yet exogenous to market fluctuations.

03

模型与方法Models & methods

研究采用"对照组 → 处理组 → 稳健性检验"的层层递进设计：先用传统特征价格（HP）模型建立参照，再引入一系列处理内生性的模型，最后通过多重稳健性检验验证结论。

The design proceeds in three tiers — comparison group → treatment group → robustness. A classical hedonic-price (HP) model sets the benchmark; a chain of models then addresses endogeneity; finally multiple robustness tests validate the findings.

  1. HPHedonic price
    检测 UGGSC 与房价、交易的直接相关，作为参照基准。Direct correlation between UGGSC and the market — the reference baseline.
  2. HP-SDMSpatial Durbin
    引入空间权重矩阵（Widw / Wqueen1），识别来自邻区的空间外溢效应。Adds spatial weight matrices (Widw / Wqueen1) to capture spillovers from neighbours.
  3. 2SLS-HP-SDMIV · causal
    以气温 × PM2.5 为工具变量、两阶段最小二乘剥离内生性，得到单向因果效应。Two-stage least squares with the temperature × PM2.5 instrument strips endogeneity for a one-directional causal effect.
  4. 2SLS-MGWRlocal · spatial heterogeneity
    多尺度地理加权回归刻画局部效应的空间异质性，用于成本—收益选址。Multi-scale geographically weighted regression maps local heterogeneity for cost–benefit siting.
  5. + ModerationUGGSC × UPS
    将公共服务设施作为调节项纳入，避免结果偏误。Public-service facilities enter as moderators to prevent bias.

建模前对核心变量做全局 Moran's I 检验：所有核心变量在 1% 水平上显著为正，存在正向空间自相关，因此有必要通过 SDM 纳入空间因素。

Before modelling, a global Moran's I test on the core variables returns positive values significant at 1% — positive spatial autocorrelation — justifying the spatial terms in the SDM.

04

结果Results

4.1 对照组：直接效应与空间外溢4.1 Comparison group: direct effects & spillovers

在不考虑空间与内生性的 HP 模型中，GSC 与 GRSC 均正向影响交易；但纳入空间权重后（HP-SDM），二者的直接效应转为不显著，说明 UGGSC 主要通过间接的空间外溢而非直接效应影响市场——邻里环境比小区自身属性更关键。Hausman 检验显示 GSC 与 GRSC 系数差显著偏离 0，模型存在内生性，需进一步采用工具变量策略。

In the HP model, both GSC and GRSC positively affect transactions; once spatial weights enter (HP-SDM) the direct effects turn insignificant — UGGSC works mainly through indirect spatial spillovers. The Hausman test shows the GSC–GRSC coefficient gap deviates significantly from 0, signalling endogeneity and motivating the IV strategy.

4.2 UGGSC 的因果效应4.2 Causal effects of UGGSC

采用 2SLS 后（2SLS-HP-SDM），结果更为合理：GSC 每增加一单位，单价上升约 6,640–10,279 元/㎡、总价上升 39.1–66.1 万元，但交易量下降 25.9–50.7 套；GRSC 则相反——单价下降约 2,001–3,251 元/㎡、总价下降 11.2–20.3 万元，但交易量上升 8.7–16.6 套。换言之，绿色抬价抑量，灰色降价促量。空间外溢方向亦然：W·GSC 为负、W·GRSC 为正。

With 2SLS (2SLS-HP-SDM), results become more reasonable: a one-unit rise in GSC lifts unit price by ≈6,640–10,279 CNY/m² and total price by 391k–661k CNY, but cuts volume by 25.9–50.7 deals; GRSC does the opposite — price down ≈2,001–3,251 CNY/m², yet volume up 8.7–16.6 deals. In short, green raises prices and suppresses turnover; grey lowers prices and stimulates it. Spillovers follow suit: W·GSC negative, W·GRSC positive.

4.3 公共服务的调节效应4.3 Moderating effects of public services

医疗、交通、文化服务对"GSC→房市"持续呈显著正向调节（p<0.01）：如在 Wqueen1 矩阵下，每增加一处医疗设施，GSC 对单价的正向作用增强约 37.5–57.5 元/㎡。相反，公共服务对"GRSC→房市"的调节多为负向。这为政府按设施类型精细选址提供了依据。

Medical, traffic and cultural services consistently strengthen the GSC→market link (p<0.01): under Wqueen1, one more medical facility raises GSC's price effect by ≈37.5–57.5 CNY/m². For GRSC the moderation is mostly negative — giving government a finer, facility-type basis for siting.

4.4 成本—收益与选址4.4 Cost–benefit & siting

以 2SLS-MGWR 刻画局部效应，杭州房市可分为跑道期（2012–15）、起飞期（2016–19）与减速期（2020–23）三阶段。聚焦近期变化：GSC 与 GRSC 对价、量的效应存在明显的分区聚类差异。中心城区（如上城、拱墅、西湖）GSC 抬价却显著抑制新增交易，唯有降价才能激活成交。

With 2SLS-MGWR, Hangzhou's market splits into runway (2012–15), take-off (2016–19) and decelerating (2020–23) stages. Recently, GSC/GRSC effects cluster sharply by district: in central districts GSC lifts prices but suppresses new transactions — only price cuts revive turnover.

据此，本文将房价低于全市 75%、50%、25% 分位、且 GSC 与 GRSC 对交易量综合正效应超过 50% 的社区，识别为潜在更新选址。这些区域多邻近中心或零星散布于中心城区，虽住房老化但仍有一定成交，具备"低成本、可预期高收益"的更新潜力。

Neighbourhoods below the 75th/50th/25th price percentiles where GSC and GRSC jointly boost turnover (>50%) are flagged as candidate sites. Mostly near or scattered within the centre, they carry aging stock yet steady turnover — the low-cost, plausibly high-yield potential regeneration favours.

05

稳健性检验Robustness

为确保结论稳健，进行三类检验：极端值（缩尾 1–99% 与 5–95%）、空间敏感性（2–5 阶 Wqueen 矩阵）、不可观测偏误。图 12、图 13 分别报告 2SLS-HP-SDM 直接效应与空间外溢的检验结果。

Three test families ensure robustness: extreme values (winsorizing at 1–99% and 5–95%), spatial sensitivity (2nd–5th-order Wqueen matrices), and unobservable bias. Figs 12–13 report tests for direct effects and spatial spillovers of 2SLS-HP-SDM.

选择偏误检验含三部分。异质性处理效应检验（Table 7）显示基准结果存在明显异质性偏误，尤以投资者最关注的单价为甚；滞后被解释变量检验表明，2012–2023 年杭州房市更受短期选择影响，投资者难以长期规划。

The selection-bias battery has three parts. The heterogeneous-treatment-effects test (Table 7) reveals sizeable heterogeneity bias — strongest for unit price, investors' key focus; the lagged-variable test shows Hangzhou's 2012–2023 market is driven more by short-term choices, leaving little room for long-term planning.

Table 7异质性处理效应检验Heterogeneous treatment effects test
Unit priceTotal priceTrans. volumeTrans. density
feTRfdTRfeTRfdTRfeTRfdTRfeTRfdTR
Std. dev. 114.572120.1090.2561.1800.5640.0081.6370.398
Std. dev. 223.247202.3670.4091.9880.9000.0132.6110.671
Positive sum1.5342.4501.5342.4501.5342.4501.5342.450
Negative sum−0.534−1.450−0.534−1.450−0.534−1.450−0.534−1.450

注：feTR、fdTR 为固定效应回归中权重与敏感度的估计量，初值为 1；标准差越远离 1，异质性越强。Note: feTR / fdTR are weight and sensitivity estimators in fixed-effects regressions (initial value 1); the further Std. dev. from 1, the stronger the heterogeneity.

倾向得分匹配（PSM）显示：匹配后协变量均值偏差由 19.5–36.5% 大幅降至 5.2–12.6%，Rubin's B（33.9–55.8）落入理想区间 [25,100]，Rubin's R 亦几乎全部落入 [0.5,2]，说明处理组与对照组高度平衡。ATE 估计表明处理变量对四类被解释变量均有高度显著的正向影响（p<0.01），且两种匹配方法结果高度一致，稳健性得到印证。

Propensity-score matching (PSM): after matching, mean covariate bias drops sharply from 19.5–36.5% to 5.2–12.6%; Rubin's B (33.9–55.8) falls within the ideal [25,100] and Rubin's R almost entirely within [0.5,2] — strong balance. ATE estimates show a highly significant positive treatment effect across all four outcomes (p<0.01), consistent across both matching methods.

06

讨论与结论Discussion & conclusion

绿色基础设施通常抬高房价，但在 GSC 高度集聚的区域，居民更倾向持有而非交易，成交量偏低——叠加强烈的持有偏好，可能显著抬升政府或投资者的征地成本，对可负担更新并不友好。相反，GRSC 集聚区房价更低、成交更活跃：低收入群体更集聚于城市中心等灰空间占比高的区域，对价格更敏感，基本住房需求某种程度上超过对绿地的偏好——这为可负担更新释放了积极信号。

Green infrastructure generally lifts prices, but where GSC concentrates, residents hold rather than trade — turnover is low, and combined with a strong holding preference this can sharply raise acquisition costs, unfriendly to affordable regeneration. Where GRSC concentrates, prices are lower and turnover higher: lower-income groups cluster in grey-heavy central areas, are more price-sensitive, and their basic housing need somewhat outweighs a preference for green — a positive signal for affordable renewal.

调节效应提示：GRSC 集聚区中，行政设施周边房价更低，医疗设施周边虽价高但成交与换手更活跃，更适合可负担更新；而 GSC 与公共服务叠加常持续推高房价、强化持有意愿，反而不宜作为理想选址。因此需综合权衡 GRSC、GSC 与公共服务的相互作用及其对市场与居民行为的影响，以优化成本—收益、最大化社会福利。

Moderation adds nuance: within grey-heavy areas, prices are lower near administrative facilities, while medical facilities pair higher prices with livelier turnover — more suitable for affordable renewal; GSC combined with public services tends to keep prices climbing and reinforce holding, making such sites less ideal. Balancing GRSC, GSC and public services jointly is therefore key to optimizing cost–benefit and social welfare.

潜在威胁在于投资者的短期行为与选择偏误。受快速城镇化与频繁限购影响，过去十年杭州投资者普遍缺乏长期规划、行为短期化；PSM 显示单价是投资者最敏感的因素。此种投资惯性下，政府投资改建可负担住房可能引发周边市场波动、抬升其他投资者信心，长期看或不利于可持续征收——卖方可能借机抬价，使成本超预期。

The threat is investors' short-termism and selection bias. Shaped by rapid urbanization and frequent purchase restrictions, Hangzhou investors broadly lack long-term planning; PSM shows unit price is their most sensitive factor. Under such inertia, public investment in affordable housing may ripple through surrounding markets and buoy other investors' confidence — over time undermining sustainable acquisition, as sellers raise prices and costs exceed expectations.

结论Conclusion

随着中国城镇化由"速度"转向"质量"，住区公平与设施包容成为提升重点。本文以杭州为例，构建多维空间计量与因果推断模型并做严格稳健性检验，强调：精准识别兼顾成本效益与社会福利的更新项目，是涉及多因素的复杂决策——不仅要考虑绿灰基础设施对市场的直接影响，更要结合区域、价格区间与投资者偏好综合研判。该整体性思路有助于精准识别可优化成本—收益、提升社会福利的更新行动，支撑城市可持续发展与居民生活品质改善。

As China's urbanization shifts from "speed" to "quality", the equity of neighbourhoods and inclusiveness of infrastructure become focal. Building multidimensional spatial-econometric and causal models with rigorous robustness checks, this study stresses that identifying cost-effective, welfare-enhancing regeneration is a complex, multi-factor decision — one that must weigh not only infrastructure's direct market effects but also region, price band and investor preference. This holistic approach supports the precise identification of renewal that optimizes cost–benefit and enhances social welfare.
